title: Emerald Craft
description: More crafts, biomes, piglins, and more villager professions!
body:
With this mod, you can trade with villagers of 9 more professions:

- Carpenters, whose job site block is Carpentry Table added from this mod.
- Glazier, whose job site block is Glass Kiln added from this mod.
- Miner, whose job site block is Mineral Table added from this mod.
- Astrologist, whose job site block is Crystalball Table added from this mod.
- Grower, whose job site block is Flower Pot (Vanilla).
- Beekeeper, whose job site block is Squeezer added from this mod.
- Geologist, whose job site block is Continuous Miner added from this mod.
- Icer, whose job site block is Ice Maker added from this mod.
- Chemical Engineer, whose job site block is Melter added from this mod.

The above-mentioned blocks can also interact with players. And emeralds are more useful than just trading with villagers. You can use melted emerald to mine ores, and craft something useful to build your own craft and make the game easier.

You can also trade with some nether mobs added from this mod, such as Piglin Cutey, Nether Pigman and Nether Lambman.

There are 14 biomes added to the game: Dead Crimson Ocean, Dead Warped Ocean, Deep Dead Crimson Ocean, Deep Dead Warped Ocean, Xanadu, Ginkgo Forest, Karst Hills, Petunia Plains, Golden Beach, Azure Desert, Jadeite Desert, Volcanic Caves, Quartz Desert and Emery Desert.

Also, a lot of decoration blocks are added so you can build more beautiful structures.

This mod requires TerraBlender >= 1.1.0.99 for Minecraft 1.18.X, and TerraBlender >= 2.0.0.120 for Minecraft 1.19.X. And you can also see the new recipes categories with JEI mod.
